_note: MI-CLEAR-LLM-inspired logging for the E2 LLM comparator.

2_stochasticity.temperature: not set (parameter deprecated for this model; provider default sampling)
2_stochasticity.repeat_policy: single sample, provider default sampling (temperature not configurable for this model)

3_full_prompt.verbatim:
You are reviewing a medical research manuscript before journal submission. Read
the manuscript below and list every specific error or problem you find. For each
item, quote the exact text that is wrong and state briefly what is wrong with it.
Consider numerical consistency, citation/reference integrity, methodological
soundness, reporting completeness, and writing style. Do not summarize the
manuscript; only list concrete problems. If you find no problems, say so.

MANUSCRIPT:
---
{manuscript}
---

5_prompt_development.note: generic prompt fixed before any variant was seen; not tuned per defect

6_test_data_independence.contamination: none; variants are programmatic mutations, not used for prompt tuning

redaction: raw outputs stored without API keys/account IDs
